scripts.sidecar:build:win: npm run sidecar:bundle && pkg sidecar.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output ../desktop/src-tauri/binaries/api-server-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.sidecar:build:mac-arm: npm run sidecar:bundle && pkg sidecar.cjs --targets node22-mac-arm64 --output ../desktop/src-tauri/binaries/api-server-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.sidecar:build:mac-x64: npm run sidecar:bundle && pkg sidecar.cjs --targets node22-mac-x64 --output ../desktop/src-tauri/binaries/api-server-x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.sidecar:build:linux: npm run sidecar:bundle && pkg sidecar.cjs --targets node22-linux-x64 --output ../desktop/src-tauri/binaries/api-server-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
